input-hz.name: Input Refresh Rate (Hz)
input-hz.description: How frequently the game checks for your input. Higher values = more responsive/precise. Set to 240 for vanilla click-on-steps behavior, 480 for CBS equivalent, max to replicate syzzi's CBF.

dangerous-settings.name: Dangerous Settings
dangerous-settings.description: These settings change physics from vanilla and are not recommended for general use.

velocity-unrounding.name: Velocity Unrounding
velocity-unrounding.description: Implementation of Velocity Unrounding, which prevents the game from rounding y-velocity to 3 decimal places.
velocity-unrounding.enable-if-description: You must enable "Dangerous Settings" to use this
